goal: 继续继承旧产品运行中与工具消息 UX

summary.title: 迁移旧产品运行中与工具消息 UX
summary.what: 将 vNext sidepanel 的运行中助手消息和工具结果消息继续向旧产品 ChatMessage/StreamingDraftContainer 收敛：assistant streaming 增加旧产品式 streaming item、spinner 和 ellipsis，且生成中不显示复制操作；tool.result 从琥珀色 debug 卡改成中性的旧产品工具结果卡，支持展开/收起运行详情并展示已有 summary/detail 渲染结果。
summary.why: 用户明确要求 UI/UX 直接继承旧产品壳，而不是继续做一套新的 debug 风格 UI。当前运行中消息和工具 trace 是真实聊天体验的核心反馈面，迁移它们能继续把可用产品从工程调试界面拉回旧产品交互模型。
summary.user_goal: 继续继承旧产品运行中与工具消息 UX

decisions.chose: 继承旧产品 StreamingDraftContainer/ChatMessage 的 waiting label、assistant-streaming-message 标识和 ellipsis 状态
decisions.rationale: vNext 已有 assistant.delta/streaming state 数据支撑，迁移展示不需要新增 runtime contract。
rejected: 继续只把 streaming 当普通 assistant 消息并显示可复制操作

decisions.chose: 把 tool.result 渲染成旧产品式中性工具卡，折叠态显示摘要和 preview，展开态显示运行详情
decisions.rationale: 旧产品工具消息是紧凑运行反馈，不是醒目的 warning/debug 卡；当前已有 summary/detail/renderToolTrace 数据，足够支撑真实展示。
rejected: 保留琥珀色 debug card 和英文 Show/Hide 文案

decisions.chose: 本轮仍不展示 retry/fork/edit 等旧产品操作
decisions.rationale: 这些操作需要 runtime.chat 级路由和状态支撑，当前迁移它们会变成假功能；本轮只迁移已有数据和事件真实支撑的展示。

rejected.alternative: 重新设计运行中与工具 trace UI
rejected.reason: 当前目标是继承旧产品 UI/UX；重新设计会继续偏离用户明确要求。

review_notes: 验证包含先红后绿的 sidepanel-app 测试、sidepanel-app/state 聚焦测试、聚焦 Biome、typecheck、build、release:smoke:mv3、bun run check。
临时 Playwright harness 通过 HTTP 服务加载构建产物，回读 streamingToolbarCount=0、toolTraceVisible=true、console/pageerror 为空；截图保存在 /tmp/bbl-sidepanel-streaming-tool.png。
Mainline prepare 的文件列表包含本 stacked branch 上前两个旧 UI 迁移提交的 App.vue 改动；本次代码提交 1949e85 实际只改 chat-transcript-pane.ts、styles.css 和 sidepanel-app.spec.ts。

architectural_claims: Sidepanel chat transcript remains a local Vue render surface; no runtime route, capability API, or public protocol changed.
Tool result UX continues to consume existing ChatToolItem summary/detail/renderToolTrace data instead of adding a new tool state model.
behavioral_changes: Assistant streaming messages expose assistant-streaming-message and assistant-streaming-spinner semantics with waiting text when empty and animated ellipsis when content exists.
Assistant streaming messages are not considered copyable turn tails, so no copy toolbar appears while the answer is still generating.
Tool result cards render as neutral old-product-style runtime cards with Chinese expand/collapse labels and aria-expanded state.
Expanded tool cards show rendered structured details in the existing sidepanel-tool-trace surface with slate styling instead of amber debug styling.
security_implications: Clipboard writes remain user-initiated and are now suppressed for streaming assistant messages.
Tool detail rendering still goes through renderToolTrace, which escapes structured JSON before assigning innerHTML.
migration_notes: Migrates old product running-message and tool-result UX while intentionally leaving retry/fork/edit for a future runtime-backed slice.
The visual harness is temporary evidence only and was not added to the repository.
